name: Lobster
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the lobster behind the head in boiling water. Look it directly in its eyestalks and ask, "Where were you on the night of the 21st?"
2. Show a picture of a scallop or sole to remind the lobster of past actions.
3. The lobster will react noticeably; it may squirm or attempt to swipe with a claw.
4. Once justice has been served (the lobster is cooked), remove it from the hot water and allow it to cool slightly until bright red in color.
5. Use fingers and implements to pick out the lobster meat into chunks.
6. Dip the chunks into melted butter.
7. Eat and enjoy. Repeat as desired.
